description: A plain, undesigned candid arrest photograph with no on-image text, graphics, or agency seals. It shows a middle-aged man with dark hair sitting in the back seat of a vehicle at night, restrained by a black seatbelt and with his hands cuffed in his lap (a chain/cuff is visible at his wrists). He wears a brown/green camouflage hooded jacket bearing a circular deer-head emblem over a bright yellow-green shirt. He looks directly at the camera with a neutral, resigned expression; the dark car interior and a faintly lit gas-station/parking-lot background are visible through the rear window. The accompanying tweet identifies him as documented Tren de Aragua member Jesus Alberto Escalona-Mujicas, arrested by ICE Houston with federal and Texas DPS partners. Although used for enforcement messaging, the image itself is a routine field arrest snapshot rather than a designed graphic.
